description: Designed and maintained end-to-end test suites for a cloud-native SaaS platform, collaborating closely with development teams to integrate quality into the SDLC.
highlights: Built a Selenium-based test framework supporting parallel execution across 3 browser targets
Implemented API contract testing with Pact, catching 30+ integration issues pre-deployment
Created performance test suites using k6, establishing baseline metrics for critical user flows
Drove adoption of Docker-based test environments, eliminating 'works on my machine' failures
